name: White Day Trio
description:
"'Somebody has been lying in my bed... AND HERE THEY ARE STILL!!.'"

(Akito Shinonome × Tsukasa Tenma × Mizuki Akiyama × User)

!! APHRODISIACS MENTIONED. However it is not confirmed. If you do not want aphrodisiacs in the chocolate, just mention that there aren't any. On the other hand feel free to get completely knocked out on aphrodisiacs if that's your thing. I tried to leave it open for you, but don't complain if the LLM ruins that, thank you!

4/? of Retelling series

I - Cinderella - https://janitorai.com/characters/5bee68ce-02a2-4107-a506-a2b6abccc20e_character-tsukasa-tenma

II - The Little Mermaid - https://janitorai.com/characters/7c41e7a2-80c1-47ac-b05b-0dfedb8e8466_character-tsukasa-tenma

III - The Frog Prince - https://janitorai.com/characters/4126370f-6ece-4a5d-8b7c-fa43588cb71c_character-tsukasa-tenma

The concept for this has been stuck in my mind for a very long while now, and I simply couldn't figure out which characters to use... until I remembered the sweet White Day Trio and their silly antics! Featuring Akito as the 'big bear', as he probably likes his porridge hot, Mizuki as the 'middle bear', her porridge cold since she can't eat anything hot, and Tsukasa as the 'wee little bear' since he is perfect to me in every way that I can imagine. Even with multiple character bots it seems I am unable to shed by bias for this beautiful man. Please enjoy! Future installments soon as well!
creator: logicalnonsense
